results.possibleIdentity: Hal Greenbaum was a technical professional and president of F. & G. Drafting & Design Service based in Riverdale, New Jersey. Active in the late 1960s and early 1970s, he was a member and technical contact for Experiments in Art and Technology (E.A.T.), a prominent non-profit organization established to facilitate collaborations between artists, engineers, and scientists. Greenbaum provided drafting and design services and was listed in the organization's technical registry, such as the 1969 E.A.T. Directory of Engineers and Scientists, which matched artists with technical experts for avant-garde projects.
